# cli { #skrom.cli }

`cli`



## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [cli](#skrom.cli.cli) | Command-line tool for skrom. |
| [create_problem](#skrom.cli.create_problem) | Create a new problem_<name> folder with starter code. |

### cli { #skrom.cli.cli }

```python
cli.cli()
```

Command-line tool for skrom.

### create_problem { #skrom.cli.create_problem }

```python
cli.create_problem(name)
```

Create a new problem_<name> folder with starter code.
